headline: NoSQL Database Types
description: NoSQL databases use non-relational models optimized for specific data patterns and scalability. Four types: Key-Value (Redis, DynamoDB), Document (MongoDB, Couchbase), Column-Family (Cassandra, HBase), Graph (Neo4j, Amazon Neptune). Choose NoSQL for: flexible schema, horizontal scaling, specific data models (graphs, time-series).

citation.name: NoSQL Distilled: A Brief Guide to the Emerging World of Polyglot Persistence (2025 Updated)
citation.author: Sadalage P.J., Fowler M.

citation.name: NoSQL vs NewSQL: Database Systems Survey 2025
